zh.lifeSummary: 當Heleine Tennant於1602年8月22日出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安卡農蓋特時，她的父親Cornelius Tennent33歲，母親Mrs Cornelius Tennent31歲。她於1624年6月10日與James Greig在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heleine Tennant于1602年8月22日出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安卡農蓋特时，她的父亲Cornelius Tennent33岁，母亲Mrs Cornelius Tennent31岁。她于1624年6月10日与James Greig在英国苏格兰艾丁波结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tennant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: status name for a farmer who held his land from an overlord by obligations of rent or service, from Middle English tena(u)nt ‘tenant’ (Old French tenant). This was the normal situation for landholders in the Middle Ages, since in the feudal system all land belonged ultimately to the king and use of it was granted in return for financial or military support.

variants.name: Tennent
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Tennant  .

nameMeanings.name: Heleine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Helen  , now in fairly frequent use in the English-speaking world, usually without the accents.

variants.name: Helena
meanings: form of   Helen  , used also in Germany, the Netherlands, Scandinavia, and Eastern Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Heleine Tennant was born on 22 August 1602, in Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Cornelius Tennent, was 33 and her mother, Mrs Cornelius Tennent, was 31. She married James Greig on 10 June 1624, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heleine Tennant est née le 22 août 1602, à Canongate, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Cornelius Tennent, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs Cornelius Tennent, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé James Greig le 10 juin 1624, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heleine Tennant am 22. August 1602 in Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cornelius Tennent 33 und ihre Mutter Mrs Cornelius Tennent 31. Sie hat am 10. Juni 1624 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom James Greig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heleine Tennant è nata il il 22 agosto 1602 nel Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Cornelius Tennent, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Mrs Cornelius Tennent, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato James Greig il 10 giugno 1624, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Heleine Tennantが1602年8月22日にスコットランドミドロスアンカノンガトで生まれた時，父Cornelius Tennentは33歳，母Mrs Cornelius Tennentは31歳であった。1624年6月10日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグでJames Greigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Heleine Tennant(이)가 1602년 8월 22일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 캔옹가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cornelius Tennent(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Cornelius Tennent(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1624년 6월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 James Greig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heleine Tennant nasceu em 22 de agosto de 1602, em Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Cornelius Tennent, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Cornelius Tennent, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com James Greig em 10 de junho de 1624, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heleine Tennant родилась 22 августа 1602 г. в местности канонгэит, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Cornelius Tennent было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Cornelius Tennent, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Greig 10 июня 1624 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heleine Tennant nació el 22 de agosto de 1602, en Canongate, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Cornelius Tennent, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs Cornelius Tennent, tenía 31 años. Se casó con James Greig el 10 de junio de 1624, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas.
